description: Per-specialist model preferences. Read by the selector cascade.

default_model.description: model_id the specialist prefers when no per-call override is provided.
default_model.title: Default Model

per_node_overrides.description: Optional per-node-name model_id overrides; node names are specialist-internal. Empty by default.
per_node_overrides.title: Per Node Overrides

specialist_id.description: Stable specialist identifier (matches the directory name).
specialist_id.title: Specialist Id

temperature_default.description: Default temperature for this specialist; bounded [0.0, 2.0].
temperature_default.title: Temperature Default

title: SpecialistModelConfig
